source_intake_record.raw_question_text: In the circuit shown in figure, the following statement is incorrect ( )
source_intake_record.raw_answer_text: When the \(\beta\) of the triode \( VT \) doubles, the \( I_C \) of the circuit also doubles.

choice_map.A: When capacitor \( C_e \) is open, the output amplitude of the circuit will decrease.
choice_map.B: Introducing direct current negative feedback through \( R_e \) gives the circuit a stable quiescent operating point.
choice_map.C: When the \(\beta\) of the triode \( VT \) doubles, the \( I_C \) of the circuit also doubles.
choice_map.D: If the circuit experiences distortion, \( R_{b1} \) should be adjusted to eliminate the distortion.
